goal: Repair the real defects surfaced during PR #153 review while rejecting false-positive Rabbit suggestions.
deliverable: A pushed PR-head update containing verified script/config/docs fixes plus governed runtime receipts for this repair run.
constraints: Validate external review comments against the current codebase before implementing anything.
Use TDD for any release-operator behavior fix.
Keep false-positive Rabbit comments intentionally unimplemented.
Do not claim the PR is repaired until tests, gates, and push all succeed.
acceptance_criteria: release-cut sync invocation tolerates older sync script parameter surfaces.
wave64-82 planning board no longer contains question-mark corruption in primary_goal fields.
release/governance evidence surfaces touched in this repair no longer contain known placeholder omissions.
Verification commands pass on the repaired branch and the branch update is pushed.
product_acceptance_criteria: Maintained-branch release operators remain backward-compatible with slimmer sync script contracts.
Governance boards and manifests remain readable and auditable.
manual_spot_checks: Inspect the final release-cut parameter guards.
Inspect the repaired planning board text against the formal wave plan.
Inspect the final diff for deliberate false-positive rejection.
completion_language_policy: Use evidence-backed repair wording only after red-green verification and remote push.
delivery_truth_contract: Confirmed findings, verification commands, and final pushed commit SHA must all be reported.
non_goals: Applying style-only wording nits with no correctness impact.
Refactoring duplicate gate helpers that are not part of a confirmed defect.
inferred_assumptions: The user wants PR #153 repaired in place.
Historical compatibility entrypoint docs under docs/*.md are deliberate and should remain unless proven broken.
